title: Vacancy for Category Manager at Ecom Express Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Category Manager at Ecom Express Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Join the Ecom Express Holdings Services family as a Category Manager in Agra. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Ecom Express Holdings Services:
Ecom Express Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ecom Express Holdings Services!
